title: The Fall of the House of Usher
writer: Edgar Allan Poe, Luis Buñuel, Jean Epstein
actors: Jean Debucourt, Marguerite Gance, Charles Lamy
plot: Allan visits the sinister Usher family mansion, where his friend Roderick is painting a portrait of his sickly wife Madeline. The portrait seems to be draining the life out of Madeline, slowly leading to her death.
